testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_modular_api_regression.py:77: in test_health_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_get_invoice_prefixes

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing prefix: service_invoice assert 'service_invoice' in {'delivery': 'DR', 'purchase_order': 'PO', 'sales_invoice': 'SI', 'transfer': 'TR'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_modular_api_regression.py:427: in test_get_invoice_prefixes assert key in data, f"Missing prefix: {key}" E AssertionError: Missing prefix: service_invoice E assert 'service_invoice' in {'delivery': 'DR', 'purchase_order': 'PO', 'sales_invoice': 'SI', 'transfer': 'TR'}

testcase.name: test_get_permission_modules

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'accounting': {'actions': {'create_expense': 'Create Expense', 'edit_expense': 'Edit Expense', 'generate_interest': 'Generate Interest', 'generate_penalty': 'Generate Penalty', ...}, 'label': 'Accounting'}, 'branches': {'actions': {'create': 'Create Branch', 'delete': 'Delete Branch', 'edit': 'Edit Branch', 'view': 'View Branches'}, 'label': 'Branches'}, 'customers': {'actions': {'create': 'Create Customer', 'delete': 'Delete Customer', 'edit': 'Edit Customer', 'manage_credit': 'Manage Credit Limit', ...}, 'label': 'Customers'}, 'dashboard': {'actions': {'view': 'View Dashboard'}, 'label': 'Dashboard'}, ...}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_modular_api_regression.py:496: in test_get_permission_modules assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'accounting': {'actions': {'create_expense': 'Create Expense', 'edit_expense': 'Edit Expense', 'generate_interest': 'Generate Interest', 'generate_penalty': 'Generate Penalty', ...}, 'label': 'Accounting'}, 'branches': {'actions': {'create': 'Create Branch', 'delete': 'Delete Branch', 'edit': 'Edit Branch', 'view': 'View Branches'}, 'label': 'Branches'}, 'customers': {'actions': {'create': 'Create Customer', 'delete': 'Delete Customer', 'edit': 'Edit Customer', 'manage_credit': 'Manage Credit Limit', ...}, 'label': 'Customers'}, 'dashboard': {'actions': {'view': 'View Dashboard'}, 'label': 'Dashboard'}, ...}, list)
